title: Positive flow: Sign in with existing Yahoo account
preconditions: The user has a Yahoo account and knows the login credentials.
test_steps: Open the application. | Tap on the 'Sign in or create account' button. | Enter the Yahoo username in the input field. | Enter the Yahoo password in the input field. | Tap the 'Sign in' button.
expected_result: The user is successfully logged in and redirected to the main application screen.

title: Negative flow: Sign in with incorrect Yahoo credentials
preconditions: The user has a Yahoo account but enters incorrect login credentials.
test_data: Incorrect Yahoo username | Incorrect Yahoo password
test_steps: Open the application. | Tap on the 'Sign in or create account' button. | Enter the incorrect Yahoo username in the input field. | Enter the incorrect Yahoo password in the input field. | Tap the 'Sign in' button.
expected_result: The user is presented with an error message indicating incorrect login credentials.

title: Negative flow: Sign in with empty fields
preconditions: The user has a Yahoo account but leaves the input fields empty.
test_steps: Open the application. | Tap on the 'Sign in or create account' button. | Leave the Yahoo username input field empty. | Leave the Yahoo password input field empty. | Tap the 'Sign in' button.
expected_result: The user is presented with an error message indicating required fields are empty.

title: Negative flow: Sign in with invalid Yahoo credentials
preconditions: The user has a Yahoo account but enters invalid login credentials.
test_data: Invalid Yahoo username | Invalid Yahoo password
test_steps: Open the application. | Tap on the 'Sign in or create account' button. | Enter the invalid Yahoo username in the input field. | Enter the invalid Yahoo password in the input field. | Tap the 'Sign in' button.
expected_result: The user is presented with an error message indicating invalid login credentials.

test_data: Expired Yahoo username | Expired Yahoo password

expected_result: The user is presented with an error message indicating expired login credentials.

test_data: Disabled Yahoo username | Disabled Yahoo password

expected_result: The user is presented with an error message indicating the account is disabled.

preconditions: The user has a Yahoo account but the account is locked.
test_data: Locked Yahoo username | Locked Yahoo password
test_steps: Open the application. | Tap on the 'Sign in or create account' button. | Enter the locked Yahoo username in the input field. | Enter the locked Yahoo password in the input field. | Tap the 'Sign in' button.
